Interface Stopwatch

All Superinterfaces:
Runnable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractStopwatch, InstantStopwatch
public interface Stopwatch extends Runnable
A stopwatch

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    Stopwatch.State
    Stopwatch state

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Stopwatch.State
    getState()
    Returns the state of this Stopwatch.
    void
    pause()
    Pauses the stopwatch.
    default void
    run()
    Starts or resumes the stopwatch.
    void
    start()
    Starts or resumes the stopwatch.
    Instant
    startTime()
    Returns a timestamp representing the time this stopwatch was started, never null.
    void
    stop()
    Stops the stopwatch and clear its stats.
    long
    timeElapsed()
    Returns how much time elapsed since the stopwatch started (in milliseconds).
    default boolean
    wasStarted()
    Determines whether this stopwatch was started.

  • Method Details

    • startTime

      Instant startTime()
      Returns a timestamp representing the time this stopwatch was started, never null.
      Returns:
      when this stopwatch was started
      Throws:
      IllegalStopwatchStateException - if wasStarted() returns false.

    • timeElapsed

      long timeElapsed()
      Returns how much time elapsed since the stopwatch started (in milliseconds). If wasStarted() returns false, returns 0L.
      Returns:
      how much time elapsed since the stopwatch started

    • run

      default void run()
      Starts or resumes the stopwatch.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Throws:
      IllegalStopwatchStateException - if the stopwatch is already running.

    • start

      void start()
      Starts or resumes the stopwatch.
      Throws:
      IllegalStopwatchStateException - if the stopwatch is already running.

    • pause

      void pause()
      Pauses the stopwatch. This method doesn't clear the stopwatch stats, unlike the stop() method.
      Throws:
      IllegalStopwatchStateException - if the stopwatch is not running.
      See Also:
      • Stopwatch.State.RUNNING

    • stop

      void stop()
      Stops the stopwatch and clear its stats.
      Throws:
      IllegalStopwatchStateException - if the stopwatch is already stopped.

    • getState

      Stopwatch.State getState()
      Returns the state of this Stopwatch.
      Returns:
      the state of this Stopwatch
      See Also:
      • Stopwatch.State

    • wasStarted

      default boolean wasStarted()
      Determines whether this stopwatch was started.
      Returns:
      whether this stopwatch was started
      See Also:
      • Stopwatch.State.RUNNING
      • Stopwatch.State.PAUSED
      "Implementation Note:"
      This method returns true if 
      getState() == State.RUNNING || getState() == State.PAUSED
